characters.name: Barbara Diffy
characters.description: Barbara "Barb" Gertrude (née Speckle) Diffyis Phil and Pim's mom and Lloyd‘s wife. She is very interested in how things work in this century. Unlike other mothers, though, Barbara seems to let her kids figure things out on their own. She loves to cook the old fashioned way--however, her food usually turns out a mess, because in 2121 they spray food out of a can, thus she has no cooking experience. Her maiden name is revealed in "Not So Great-Great-Grandpa"; her great-grandfather is Kyle Speckle. Barb is two years younger than Lloyd, and is kind, loving and very intelligent.

characters.name: Curtis
characters.description: Curtisis a caveman that stowed away onthe Diffys' time machine. He got stuck in 2004 with the Diffys and lived with them. As the series goes on, he pursues a more modern attitude like cleaning his home, less grunts and more English type but his caveman instincts cause the Diffy family a trouble or two. Curtis loves rocks and knows a lot about them. Like Vice Principal Hackett, he is portrayed by J.P. Manoux.  "Gootanga!"

characters.name: Debbie Berwick
characters.description: Debbie Cassidy Annie “jingle Berwick was Pim Diffy's “friend.” She was "perfect" and Pim despise her It was found out that Debbie Berwick was living with her grandmother and five dogs she hates her curfew at 6 o‘clock, and she can hold a note for a long time,Halloween it was revealed that she’s one of the cyborgs from the future They were supposed to be "super sweet, giving, and caring to make the world a better place she gets crankier if Phil’s dad do something but something had malfunctioned. Over time, they would become crazier and crazier, until their sweetness turned into evil And even devil Apparently, the cyborgs had a problem of overheating due to their evilness Turns into pudding They were all then sent to the 21st century. It also revealed that the two things that got her mad were is pim diffy is the worse nightmare is pim is not even not Debbie her friend no more not ever again it gets pim  really disgusted and she hates Berwick since 6th grade naughty nibblers" and  her grandma wouldn’t even let her to breaking the rules she hated her stupid curfew that her nana gave her for her to get home at 6 o'clock and she might’ve got mad at her grandma she get home at 6 before midnight

characters.name: Keely Teslow
characters.description:
•Tia Deanna Fedichelli (best friend) 
•Seth Wosmer
•Olivia 
•Debbie Berwick Keelianna "Keely" Sara Teslowis a student at H.G. Wells High School and Phil's best friend. She is also one of the main protagonists in the series. Keely is an easy-going, bubbly, energetic person and a bit airheaded. At the beginning of the series, she is seen as being part of the popular crowd, yet she proves to have a sweet personality throughout the course of the series since Keely is shown to care about the wellbeing of others (notably Phil) and can be polite. She doesn't like it when someone acts mean or says something rude as well. Keely is pursuing for a number of jobs considering that she says that she wants to be a cat psychologist when she grows up, yet she secretly dreams of becoming a singer. Stage fright prevents her from pursuing this dream until Phil offers the support and encouragement she needs to gain confidence. Later, she becomes interested in journalism & hopes to become a reporter. Keely is an easy-going, bubbly, energetic person and a bit airheaded. Later, she becomes interested in journalism & hopes to become a reporter.

characters.name: Kyle Speckle
characters.description: Kyle Speckleis Barbara Diffy's great-grandfather, as well as Phil and Pim's great-great grandfather. A student at H.G. Wells, Kyle frequently got into trouble with Vice Principal Hackett due to his numerous pranks. Hackett eventually had enough and expelled him. Kyle was then sent to military school where he met his wife, Petunia. Kyle shows up in his military school uniform with his new girlfriend Christi. When the family asks if she is Petunia, he says it isn't and explains his lack of interest in her. However, this changes when he hears from Lloyd that she likes him. He promptly dumps Christi to pursue Petunia, to his girlfriend's anger. This presumably puts history on its right path.

characters.name: Lil Danny Dawkins
characters.description: Danny in the series goes to school at H.G Wells High, he has a extreme crush on Pim which she ignores his futile attempts on dating him, Pim uses him on every plan that she lays out and he'll go out of his way to impress her. Pim does like him at a point but doesn't show it. He is played by Brandon Smith

characters.name: Lloyd Diffy
characters.description: Lloyd Diffyis Barbara's husband and Phil and Pim's goofy dad. Lloyd Diffy was born sometime around 2074 and married Barbara Speckle sometime in the future. It is also noted that Lloyd also has a brother as when he exclamed "Don't let my brother have my collectable Astronaut cards?" shortly before testing the time machine. ("Back to the Future (Not the Movie)") Usually known as the klutz of the family (UNDER CONSTUCTION)
characters.personality_section: Usually known as the klutz of the family (UNDER CONSTUCTION)

characters.name: Ms. Winston
characters.description:
Ms. WinstonisPim Diffy`s teacher. She is played by Suzanne Krull.
The sound effect of a whip is almost always played during scenes with Ms. Winston due to her tendency to crack out orders and statements with the feeling of a whip.  Her style of speaking is dramatic, usually leading to Pim and Phil making faces at least once while she speaks to them.  She has shoulder-length straight brown hair, a slim face and body and piercing brown eyes. Ms. Winston's specialty is writing.  She teaches creative writing and a handwriting class for children, which included Phil in one episode due to handwriting being almost obsolete in 2121. She is quite competitive, as is seen when she is depending on Pim winning the creative writing competition.

characters.name: Neil Hackett
characters.description: Vice Principal Neil Hackettis the vice principal ofH.G. Wells Junior and Senior High School. He is always in a sweater vest, even when he is not at school. Apparently at some point in time he was in the army. He is very paranoid about aliens, and almost always tries to prove the Diffys are aliens or tries to uncover their secret. He was born in Woodstock, New York, 1969, in a drum circle, which was discovered by Pim via her wizard.  He is also very sensitive about his baldness. He is always trying methods to cure his baldness. Always getting pranked by Kyle Speckle who he eventually expells from the high school. He has had an unpleasant run-in with Curtis. When he is not fulfilling his duties as vice principal he teaches math.  He is very easily fooled despite his assertions to the contrary.  He has problems with the ladies and displays both low and high self-esteem when it comes to the opposite sex.  He has a dog named Roswell. He's portrayed byJ.P. Manoux.

characters.name: Phil Diffy
characters.description: Philip "Phil" Rupert Diffyis the main and titular character of the series. He is the eponymous 14-year-old (Later 15 Year Old) who became trapped in the year 2003. He went to a present-day school calledH.G. WellsJunior and Senior High School and befriended a girl namedKeely Teslow, who later became his girlfriend. His family includes his sisterPim Diffy, his motherBarbara Diffy, his fatherLloyd Diffy, and his great-great grandfatherKyle Speckle. He returns to his time by the end of the series. Phil is at best an easy-going, friendly, caring and very lovable kind of character. Due to education far ahead of his time, he's displayed to be extremely intelligent (as seen in the pilot); his math skills are phenomenal. He does, however, lack skills and knowledge that are common to the 21st century, so he can come across as clueless, even foolish. Fortunately, he almost always manages to cover up the fact that he's from an entirely different century. He's generally a by-the-book guy, but being trapped in a different century both forces and allows him to do things he wouldn't normally do. Phil has very dark brown hair and brown eyes. Phil is at best an easy-going, friendly, caring and very lovable kind of character. characters.name: Tia
characters.description: Tia is Keely's best female friend in the first season. She is friendly but somewhat of an airhead and judgemental. At first she is skeptical of Phil fitting in with her and Keely, but she quickly adjusts to Phil's personality and regularly hangs out with Phil and Keely, even talking to the less cool Seth Wassmer. She was replaced in Season 2 byOlivia ("Via")(Juliet Holland-Rose) due to Brenda Song getting cast as London Tipton on "The Suite Life of Zack and Cody" and it's spinoff "The Suite Life on Deck.

characters.description: Olivia(nicknamedVia) is Keely`s secondary female best friend and they became close afterTiamoved away. Since she shares Keely's interests, Phil stopped getting bothered by the girl centric activities when he often hung out with Keely. She is portrayed by Juliet Holland-Rose. To be written.
